name: skill: SKILL.md recommends Suspense for async (g-react-005) and Error Boundaries on routes (g-react-006)
command: grep -E "Suspense" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/SKILL.md" 1>&2 && grep -E "Error Boundary|error boundary" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/SKILL.md" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
